name: Grasshopper Dessert
recipeIngredient: Jello-O-Lime Gelatin (2 3 oz. packages or 1 6 oz. package)
Green crème de menthe liqueur (2 tbsp)
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve gelatin and sugar in boiling water.
2. Add cold water and liqueur to the mixture.
3. Pour 1 cup of the gelatin mixture into a bowl and chill slightly until slightly thickened.
4. Pour the remaining gelatin mixture into a 9-inch square pan.
5. Chill until firm, at least 3 hours.
6. Cut into 1/2 inch squares.
Meanwhile:
7. Prepare whipped topping mix according to package directions.
8. Blend the whipped topping into the slightly thickened gelatin.
9. Pour into a 3-cup bowl and chill until firm, about 3 hours.
10. Unmold the creamy gelatin in the center of a shallow serving bowl.
11. Arrange gelatin cubes around the mold.
12. Garnish with chocolate curls if desired. Makes about 5 cups or 8 - 10 servings.
